item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Chicken bake with vegetables and du puy lentils, served with crispy roasted potatoes and creamy tomato sauce. Topped with fresh pea shoots. (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Menudo. Spiced pork stew from the Philippines in a deep umami sauce, served with jasmine rice and spring onions. Served with ensaladong talong. (7+8+15) GREEN DISH: Menudo. Spiced stew with crispy tofu and chickpeas in a deep umami sauce, served with jasmine rice and spring onions. Served with ensaladong talong. (7+8+15) A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice to create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Grandma's finest meatballs with parsley creamed vegetables, crispy potatoes and cucumber salad. (1+2+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Juicy broccoli and pea fritters with parsley creamed vegetables, crispy potatoes and cucumber salad. (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Arroz de Pato. Welcome to Portugal. Confit duck served with rice slow-cooked in rich duck stock and baked with spiced chorizo. Finished with fresh herbs on top. (10+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Arroz de Pato in a green version. Chickpeas and plant protein slow-cooked in rich stock and baked with spiced vegetables. Finished with fresh herbs on top. (10+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Aromatic Thai green curry with succulent chicken, creamy coconut milk and plenty of fresh vegetables, served with steamed jasmine rice and scattered with fresh spring onions. Served with crisp sweet and sour cucumber salad with roasted cashews. (7+8+9+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Aromatic Thai green curry with silken tofu, creamy coconut milk and plenty of fresh vegetables, served with steamed jasmine rice and scattered with fresh spring onions. Served with crisp sweet and sour cucumber salad with roasted cashews. (7+8+9+15)
